permission_basis: User-supplied attachment for the American Study M2 school import.
normalization_notes: Mapped source header aliases website and niche_profile to website_url and niche_profile_url.
Mapped official US state names to uppercase postal codes.
Normalized setting and student_body enum values to lowercase and niche grades to uppercase.
Serialized strengths with semicolon-space delimiters while preserving source item text and order.
Normalized Unicode or mojibake grade dashes to ASCII hyphens.
Preserved blank numeric, URL, text, and notes fields as blank CSV cells so the importer stores nulls.
Did not invent, scrape, or infer any missing value.
